meta.note: EA: Boortmalt set as sole active client with full roadmap/deliverables/backlog/structure

frontSeat.mission: ABN AMRO onboarding: confirm scope + first security-architecture deliverable.

domains.ctx: Smart-living + dev-upside sourcing. Radar: Den Haag / Koningin Emmakade DD.
Two engagements: ABN AMRO (Security EA — onboarding) + Coca-Cola (Infra & Security EA — in-flight). Protect deep work; close onboarding admin.
Arbor v2 branch + Firebase/Cloud Run scaffold; decide deploy + AI key.
Inbox, calendar, school placement, travel, health — today's execution layer.
Contracts, tax, insurance, subscriptions, personal-finance guardrails.
LinkedIn / job positioning, campaigns, thought leadership.

map.e: Conflicts, sanctions, supply shocks, AI/security shifts → decision impact only.
HV pipeline, BRRRR math, asset watch, lender/tax risk → go / no-go.
Cash, invoices, contracts, subscriptions, insurance, tax → next admin action.
Trips, schools, routes, docs. Rule: Brussels = Central/Midi, never CRL.
Move before 60m sitting, stretch, run, recovery. Calendar removes guilt.
Dylan schools, Keren visits, Hebrew/English, Amsterdam Noord proximity.
ABN AMRO (Security EA, onboarding) + Coca-Cola (Infra & Security EA). Architecture decisions, follow-ups.
Quote, music, article/bookmark revival. Resilience fuel, not productivity.

back.t: ABN AMRO: confirm onboarding scope + access + stakeholders
ABN AMRO + Coca-Cola: create engagement Drive + ROS folders

signals.s: Refi gap sensitivity on HV deals — confirm before any go/no-go.
Wet betaalbare huur / WWS — monitor for ceiling shifts.
Energy + supply shocks → only if it changes a Guy/HV/EA decision.
